title: What possibly happened between 20 and 30
wikitext:
[]: What possibly happened between 2.0 and 3.0             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Jan 07, 2021 7:38 pm Taken from my comments on a YouTube cam upload of Evangelion 0706: At the end of 2.0 Shinji tried to save Rei from the Tenth Angel's core after she was absorbed into it, but had to Awaken Unit 01 to do so. The fusion of the Awakened Unit 01 with the remains of the Angel started up Third Impact, but it was cancelled when Kaworu, in Unit 06, yote the Spear of Cassius through Unit 01 and descended to Earth. While Rei, Shinji, and the remains of the Tenth Angel were sealed in Unit 01, which was made off-limits, SEELE and NERV went at it. Among all of this, Asuka was made clean of the Ninth Angel's infection of her body, but lost her eye in the process, and became irreversibly, part Angel. This is why she can survive in the toxic L-Barrier [red powdery stuff covering all of Earth, most dense in Tokyo-3], and Mari's activation of Unit 02's beast form allowed her to become the same, though she's part EVA instead of part Angel. Asuka joining Mari, Kaworu, and possibly another Rei, NERV once again had a team of pilots. There is also another person involved in this pilot team led by Kaworu, but we do not know who it is. Likely candidates are Hikari, Touji, Kensuke, and Sakura Suzuhara. Unit 06, now modified into the autonomous Mark.06, descended into Terminal Dogma to take the Spear of Longinus out of Lilith's body, and use it to fend off SEELE. However, Mark.06 didn't malfunction, it was somehow infected with the Twelfth Angel when it went down into TD. When Rei in Mark.09 cuts off it's head during 3.0, that's why the Twelfth is released. My theory here is that, since SEELE assembled Unit 06 on the moon, and didn't want even Gendo any closer than in a lunar probe (2.0), AND that Mari said the Twelfth isn't supposed to exist (3.0), SEELE themselves built the Twelfth into Unit 06 as a sort of failsafe. When it was made autonomous by NERV, they didn't even think to check for Angel infection, so when it got near Lilith, it went berserk and tried to fuse with her. During the construction of Unit 06, we see a white giant that looks just like Lilith [wearing the original Neon Genesis SEELE mask just like NGE Lilith] being used as the base for the EVA. Instead of retrieving the Spear, Mark.06/Twelfth fused with Lilith, which caused Third Impact to resume where it left off. The results are what we see in 3.0. Unit 01 was locked in an Angel-sealing prison, which was launched into space to avoid anyone going anywhere near it, with multiple Nemesis Series [SEELE's artificial Angels with multiple Cores in a Core Block] guarding it. Most life on Earth is now gone, or transformed into enormous, headless red translucent EVAs. Tokyo-3 has been desecrated, torn in half with tooth-like structures lining the sides of the fissure, NERV HQ elevated into the sky. The entire planet is covered in the toxic red L-Field, which eliminates any life that isn't Angel-based. At this point, NERV and SEELE seem to have reached an impasse or an agreement, and rejoin forces. At some point during all this, the majority of NERV staff broke off and formed their own resistance group, WILLE, fighting both NERV and SEELE. Around this time, AAA WUNDER was constructed by SEELE and NERV as a flying fortress, essentially an enormous flying EVA piloted by a perfected Dummy System [hence the Autonomous Assault Ark name]. WILLE was somehow able to steal this ship, but it was incomplete, and they needed a power source. Then they remembered, there was an endless battery in the form of an Awakened Unit 01. Units 08 and 02, piloted by Mari and Asuka respectively, were launched into the outer atmosphere to retrieve Unit 01 in Operation US. During the mission, however, Asuka is blindsided by one of the small Evas defending Unit 01, and out of desperation, calls for Shinji's help. Unit 01 reactivates, and uses the eye lasers it evolved when becoming Awakened, to destroy the Nemesis Series units. All three EVAs are successfully returned to WILLE, and Shinji and his SDAT player are returned to physical form. As for my source, it's exclusively 2.0's "next episode preview" and what we see in 3.0. A lot of it is inference and paying super close attention to the tiniest background details. For instance, during the first half of Third Impact at the end of 2.0, Kaji says that "SEELE won't stand for this". During Shinji's exploration of NERV HQ, we see a lot of shots of destroyed military equipment and even mounds of tanks, so there was definitely some sort of trouble that ended within NERV HQ. As for Gendo and Fuyutsuki with a donkey, I got no fuggin clue.

[]: Re: What possibly happened between 2.0 and 3.0             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed Jan 13, 2021 4:59 am There's already a thread and a good post from Reichu: thread/20248/Third-Impact-Tentative-Reconstructed-Timeline/

[]: Re: What possibly happened between 2.0 and 3.0             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Wed Jan 13, 2021 8:30 pm Ah shit. I tried to see if there was one but this forum's search feature is more fucked than some EVA comparison that would make me sound like even more of a turbo-virgin than I already am.
